activities_projects.title: Meaning of Marginalisation
activities_projects.objective: Understand the basic meaning of marginalisation
steps: Read the section explaining marginalisation in the textbook
Write the meaning of marginalisation in simple words
Give one example of a marginalised group

activities_projects.title: Identify Marginalised Groups
activities_projects.objective: Recognise groups that may face marginalisation
steps: Write the names of three groups mentioned in the chapter
Write one difficulty faced by each group
Explain why these groups need support

activities_projects.title: Understanding Adivasi Communities
activities_projects.objective: Learn about Adivasi communities in India
steps: Read about Adivasis in the textbook
Write two facts about Adivasi communities
Explain where many Adivasis live
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands basic information about Adivasi communities

activities_projects.title: Respect for Diversity
activities_projects.objective: Understand the importance of respecting different communities
steps: Write two ways to respect people from different communities
Explain why respect is important in society
Share your ideas in class discussion

activities_projects.title: Problems Faced by Marginalised Groups
activities_projects.objective: Identify common challenges faced by marginalised communities
steps: Write two problems faced by marginalised groups
Explain why these problems occur
Suggest one simple way to help these groups

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Activity
activities_projects.objective: Learn key terms related to marginalisation
steps: Write words such as marginalisation, discrimination, equality
Write the meaning of each word
Use each word in a sentence

activities_projects.title: Poster on Equality
activities_projects.objective: Understand the importance of equal treatment
steps: Draw a poster showing people from different communities together
Add a message promoting equality and respect
Explain your poster to the class

activities_projects.title: Story of Inclusion
steps: Write a short story about helping someone who feels left out
Explain how others supported the person
Describe why inclusion is important

activities_projects.title: Class Discussion on Marginalisation
activities_projects.objective: Understand why some groups are excluded from opportunities
steps: Discuss why some groups may not get equal opportunities
Write two points from the discussion
Explain how society can reduce marginalisation

activities_projects.title: Short Paragraph on Marginalisation
steps: Write a short paragraph explaining marginalisation
Mention one marginalised group
Explain why equality is important
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the importance of equality in society
